record.field: Apply Exact Smart Hospital ERP Permissions Matrix

u_doctor = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_doctor', False) u_med = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_med_manager', False) u_rec = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_receptionist', False) u_inv = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_inventory', False) u_proc = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_procurement', False) u_maint = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_maintenance', False) u_acc = env.ref('smart_hospital_security.user_accountant', False)
hospital_users = [u for u in [u_doctor, u_med, u_rec, u_inv, u_proc, u_maint, u_acc] if u] user_ids = tuple([u.id for u in hospital_users])
if user_ids: user_ids_cond = f"({user_ids[0]})" if len(user_ids) == 1 else str(user_ids)
standard_group_refs = [ 'hr.group_hr_manager', 'hr.group_hr_user', 'stock.group_stock_manager', 'stock.group_stock_user', 'purchase.group_purchase_manager', 'purchase.group_purchase_user', 'maintenance.group_equipment_manager', 'account.group_account_manager', 'account.group_account_invoice', 'account.group_account_readonly', 'project.group_project_manager', 'project.group_project_user' ]
all_app_group_ids = [] for r in standard_group_refs: g = env.ref(r, False) if g: all_app_group_ids.append(g.id)
if all_app_group_ids: admin_ids_cond = f"({all_app_group_ids[0]})" if len(all_app_group_ids) == 1 else str(tuple(all_app_group_ids)) env.cr.execute(f"DELETE FROM res_groups_users_rel WHERE uid IN {user_ids_cond} AND gid IN {admin_ids_cond}")
def grant_group(user, group_ref): if not user: return group = env.ref(group_ref, False) if group: env.cr.execute("SELECT 1 FROM res_groups_users_rel WHERE uid=%s AND gid=%s", (user.id, group.id)) if not env.cr.fetchone(): env.cr.execute("INSERT INTO res_groups_users_rel (uid, gid) VALUES (%s, %s)", (user.id, group.id))
for u in hospital_users: grant_group(u, 'base.group_user')
# (Doctor) grant_group(u_doctor, 'stock.group_stock_user') grant_group(u_doctor, 'project.group_project_user')
# (Medical Operations Manager) grant_group(u_med, 'hr.group_hr_user') grant_group(u_med, 'stock.group_stock_user') grant_group(u_med, 'project.group_project_manager')
# (Receptionist) grant_group(u_rec, 'account.group_account_invoice') grant_group(u_rec, 'project.group_project_user')
# (Medical Inventory Officer) grant_group(u_inv, 'stock.group_stock_manager') grant_group(u_inv, 'purchase.group_purchase_user') grant_group(u_inv, 'maintenance.group_equipment_manager') grant_group(u_inv, 'project.group_project_user')
# (Procurement Manager) grant_group(u_proc, 'stock.group_stock_user') grant_group(u_proc, 'purchase.group_purchase_manager') grant_group(u_proc, 'project.group_project_user')
# (Maintenance Technician) grant_group(u_maint, 'stock.group_stock_user') grant_group(u_maint, 'maintenance.group_equipment_manager') grant_group(u_maint, 'project.group_project_user')
# (Accountant) grant_group(u_acc, 'purchase.group_purchase_user') grant_group(u_acc, 'project.group_project_user') grant_group(u_acc, 'account.group_account_invoice')
def get_or_create_emp(user, default_name, job_title): if not user: return None emp = env['hr.employee'].search([('user_id', '=', user.id)], limit=1) if not emp: emp = env['hr.employee'].create({'user_id': user.id, 'name': default_name, 'job_title': job_title}) return emp
emp_med = get_or_create_emp(u_med, 'Dr. Ahmad (Medical Manager)', 'Medical Operations Manager') emp_proc = get_or_create_emp(u_proc, 'Eng. Sami (Procurement Manager)', 'Procurement Manager') doctor = get_or_create_emp(u_doctor, 'Dr. Ola (Hospital Doctor)', 'Hospital Doctor') receptionist = get_or_create_emp(u_rec, 'Samer (Receptionist)', 'Receptionist') inventory = get_or_create_emp(u_inv, 'Fadi (Inventory Officer)', 'Inventory Officer') maintenance = get_or_create_emp(u_maint, 'Tareq (Maintenance Technician)', 'Maintenance Tech') accountant = get_or_create_emp(u_acc, 'Amjad (Hospital Accountant)', 'Hospital Accountant')
if emp_med: if doctor: doctor.write({'parent_id': emp_med.id}) if receptionist: receptionist.write({'parent_id': emp_med.id}) if emp_proc: if inventory: inventory.write({'parent_id': emp_proc.id}) if maintenance: maintenance.write({'parent_id': emp_proc.id}) if accountant: accountant.write({'parent_id': emp_proc.id})
